comments.author: Steve
comments.text:
I have an extension of this idea.

If our source codebase doesn't have .claude files (like TS didn't), we should write claude files for the source first.

This sort of boils down to me saying we can do a better job of not only auditing the source codebase but carefully indexing it and "compressing" it.

comments.author: Steve
comments.text: I think this is a consequence of what I said in the above reply. We need to do an even more thorough inventory of the existing code before we start porting.

comments.author: Steve
comments.text: Yup, we should do a better job up front of estimating the "Difficulty of Axis" for each axis.
